name_cn:
Authentic Grade
5BA278, Miu Miu summer pastoral vacation style, new woven hollow wicker basket. The special rattan arc design makes the bag shape very novel, chic, and three-dimensional. Front hand-stitched leather logo. Double leather handles and shoulder strap. Inside features a canvas zip pocket. Comes with an adjustable leather long shoulder strap. Perfect for picnics, pastoral vacations, and beach trips. Dimensions: 20X 15X 7.5cm
